objective: Delete orphaned legacy non-prep acoustic helper and its dead tests without touching the operational PREP-based forecast path.

pre_delete_reference_scan.classification: No caller/import in src other than the helper definition. Script references are historical M6 diagnostic paths, not the daily-pipeline or operational release path.

post_delete_reference_scan.result: No references remain under src, scripts, or tests.

tests.justification: Dead test imported the orphaned legacy non-prep helper and exercised a single-substep path not used by the operational PREP-based RK step.
Dead/stale one-off fixture test imported the orphaned legacy helper; its own skip reason identified the helper as test-only and not on the operational path.
Dead fixture test imported the orphaned legacy helper superseded by the PREP-based acoustic scan.
Strict xfail targeted the orphaned helper's theta_coupled_work=None bug; its tracking text explicitly called for deleting the helper and tests or wiring the old path.
